display.purpose: Page titles and hero lettering. Art Nouveau signage face; titles only.

heading.purpose: Section titles, often paired with engraved-sign ornament.

body.purpose: All running text, descriptions, and form fields. Never set titles in this.

label.purpose: Nav links, language switcher, short field labels (<=4 words).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Gentle ease-out for link/hover color and state transitions.

components.name: Primary Navigation Bar
components.description: Full-width pine-green band with cream Metropolitain links; active item turns Marche Orange.
components.html: AccueilLe MarchéAssociationsMédiasContact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 60px; height: 60px; background: #515f51; } .ds-nav a { font-family: 'metropolitain', 'Limelight', Georgia, serif; font-size: 18px; color: #fff4de; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: 0.02em; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-nav a:hover, .ds-nav a:focus-visible { color: #e88335; outline: none; } .ds-nav-active { color: #e88335 !important; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Flat sage-beige panel on the cream page; tonal step plus optional hairline pine border. No shadow.
components.html:
Marché aux oiseaux

Le rendez-vous des éleveurs et amateurs, chaque 15 août sur la grand-place.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #dfdcbc; border: 1px solid #515f51; border-radius: 5px; padding: 24px; max-width: 360px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'metropolitain', 'Limelight', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #8f9782; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'goudy', 'Goudy Bookletter 1911', Georgia, serif; font-size: 17px; line-height: 1.6; color: #515f51; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Sage-beige fill, no border at rest, 5px radius, Goudy text; gains a visible focus ring (modernization fix).
components.html: <label class="ds-label" for="ds-name">Nom</label><input class="ds-input" id="ds-name" type="text" placeholder="Votre nom">
components.css: .ds-label { display: block; font-family: 'metropolitain', 'Limelight', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #515f51; margin: 0 0 6px; } .ds-input { background: #dfdcbc; border: none; border-radius: 5px; padding: 10px 12px; width: 260px; font-family: 'goudy', 'Goudy Bookletter 1911', Georgia, serif; font-size: 16px; color: #515f51; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6f7a6a; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #e88335; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Section Heading (Engraved Sign)
components.description: Signature device: centered Metropolitain title in sage green, the site's 'engraved sign' look.
components.css: .ds-sign { font-family: 'metropolitain', 'Limelight', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 1.75rem); color: #8f9782; text-align: center; letter-spacing: 0.01em; margin: 0 0 24px; }

components.name: Language Switcher
components.description: FR/NL parity toggle; active language in pine, inactive in sage.
components.css: .ds-lang { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'metropolitain', 'Limelight', Georgia, serif; font-size: 15px; } .ds-lang a { text-decoration: none; color: #8f9782; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-lang a:hover, .ds-lang a:focus-visible { color: #e88335; outline: none; } .ds-lang-active { color: #515f51 !important; }

narrative.overview: Marche 1900 is the website of a turn-of-the-century heritage market in the Ardennes town of Marche-en-Famenne. The visual system is built around a single image: a sunlit village green during a 1900s summer fête. Muted pine and sage greens stand in for the trees and lawns; warm cream is the dust of the square and the paper of a vintage program; a single warm orange is the bunting and the late-afternoon light. Over all of it sits the lettering of the era: Hector Guimard's Paris Métro signage (Metropolitain) for every title and sign, and Goudy Bookletter 1911 for the running text. The system is quiet and earthy on purpose; authenticity comes from real period typography, muted natural color, and generous calm, never from costume-drama props.
keyCharacteristics: Muted heritage greens + warm cream, with a single rare orange accent
Period typography: Metropolitain (Art Nouveau display) over Goudy Bookletter 1911 (1911 serif)
Flat, tonal depth: cream → sage-beige → hairline green borders, no drop shadows
Centered, calm, low-density composition; bilingual FR/NL at parity
Earthy and authentic, never corporate, never kitsch

rules.name: The Rare Orange Rule
rules.body: Marche Orange (#e88335) is an interaction color, never a decoration. It appears only on the active or hovered element, never as a fill, a heading color, or a band. If more than one orange thing is visible at rest, remove all but the active one.

rules.name: The Two-Green Rule
rules.body: Pine Green is for reading (body, structure, borders); Sage Green is for labelling (titles, signs). Don't set body copy in sage, and don't set titles in pine.

rules.name: The Signage-Only Rule
rules.body: Metropolitain is signage, not text. Use it for titles, navigation, and labels of four words or fewer. Running copy is always Goudy.

rules.name: The Period-Fidelity Rule
rules.body: Both faces are early-1900s designs and must stay legible. Don't squeeze tracking on Metropolitain to decorate, and don't drop Goudy below ~16px for body.

rules.name: The Flat-Paper Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are paper on a table, not cards floating above one. No box-shadow, ever. To separate a panel, change its fill to sage-beige and/or add a 1px Pine Green border.

dos: Do keep the two-green + cream + rare-orange palette (Pine #515f51 text/structure, Sage #8f9782 titles, Cream #fff4de page, Sage-Beige #dfdcbc surfaces, Orange #e88335 active/hover only).
Do set every title, nav item, and label in Metropolitain and every paragraph in Goudy Bookletter 1911.
Do keep surfaces flat: tonal fills and 1px green borders for separation, never shadows.
Do bump body text to at least ~16–17px and cap measure at 65–75ch.
Do add visible keyboard focus states and prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks; target WCAG 2.1 AA contrast.
Do treat FR and NL as equals: any layout must flex for both languages' text lengths.
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS / website-builder template look: no cream-bg-plus-gradient hero, no grid of identical icon-heading-text cards.
Don't reproduce the dated, cramped feel: no fixed 980px desktop-only layout, no sub-16px body text, no busy heavy textures.
Don't drift corporate/cold: no corporate blue, no sterile business stock photography with no local character.
Don't descend into theme-park kitsch: no faux parchment, ornate gold scrollwork, or fake-vintage gimmicks.
Don't set body copy in Metropolitain or in Sage Green, and don't use orange as a fill or heading color.
Don't add box-shadow, gradient text, or side-stripe borders.
